commands.purpose: Dump the SearchIndex registry. Without arguments — lists every registered (model, engine, index_name) with status + document_count + config_hash + needs-reindex flag. With `model` — full detail for one model including every #[SearchField] / #[SearchFacet] / #[SearchBoost] / #[SearchSynonym]. `--refresh-cache` rebuilds the cache from source. `--engine` filters by adapter. `--json` emits machine-parseable output.

Trigger a zero-downtime reindex. Without arguments — reindexes every registered model. With `model` — reindexes one. `--from-artifact` reads rows from a transfer XferArtifact (cross-region migration flow) instead of live DB. `--async` dispatches ReindexModelBatchJob (default); without — runs the coordinator inline (dev only). `--as` impersonates a target user (initiator = that user). `--no-notify` suppresses the completion notification. Creates a SearchSyncJob and returns its id.

commands.signature: search:flush {model : FQCN or table name} {--engine=} {--yes : Skip confirmation}
commands.purpose: Drop a model's search index (all versions). Rare — usually only during schema migrations that make the current index incompatible. Prompts for confirmation unless `--yes`. Records a SearchSyncJob with kind=flush + audit trail. `--engine` targets one engine if the model is indexed on multiple.

CRUD + bulk operations on search_synonyms. `--action=list` prints active synonyms. `add` creates one (`--terms=flu --terms=influenza --terms=grippe`). `update` modifies one by `--id`. `delete` soft-deletes. `warm-cache` re-pushes to engine adapters. `import`/`export` for JSON/CSV bulk workflows.

Search analytics inspection + retention. `--action=summary` prints query volume + avg took_ms + no-results rate + click-through rate. `top` prints the top queries by count (uses query_hash). `no-results` prints the no-result queries admins should watch. `prune` dispatches PruneSearchAnalyticsJob — combined with `--stale-only` for the 15-min sweep from schedule.json.

commands.signature: search:test-query {query} {--model=*} {--engine=} {--limit=10} {--filter=*} {--facets=*} {--boost=*} {--no-record : Do not write an analytics event} {--json}
commands.purpose: Run a query from the CLI and print the result set + timings + facets. Useful for admin diagnostics + relevance tuning without polluting analytics (`--no-record`).
List search_sync_jobs — platform-admin observability. Filter by status / kind / tenant.

Cancel a queued or running SearchSyncJob. Sets status=cancelling; the next shard boundary bails out and any in-flight target index is left un-swapped. `--force` cancels even in terminal state (platform-admin only, audit-heavy).

Probe every configured engine. Reports reachability, index count, sync lag, drift-vs-config, worker freshness. `--check-drift` triggers the config_hash comparison surfaced by the hourly `search-drift-check` schedule.
